name: Marshmallow Nut Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Walnut or Pecan Meats (coarsely chopped or broken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the marshmallows in the sweet cream.
2. Finely crumble the graham crackers.
3. Quarter the dates lengthwise and coarsely chop or break the walnut or pecan meats.
4. Mix all ingredients together to form a loaf.
5. Keep the loaf in a cool place until ready to serve.
6. Slice when ready to serve, either alone or with whipped cream.
